properties.name: resource-completion-config.force-erase-file-name
properties.description: Regenerate resource file names even when a file name already exists.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.download-user-agent
properties.description: User-agent sent when downloading remote resources.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Connection timeout, in milliseconds, for remote resource downloads.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.socket-timeout-ms
properties.description: Socket timeout, in milliseconds, for remote resource downloads.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.embedding-similarity-threshold
properties.description: Cosine similarity threshold used to group image embeddings.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.perceptive-hash-size
properties.description: Perceptive hash size used by jImageHash.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.perceptive-hash-alpha-threshold
properties.description: Alpha value above which transparent pixels are treated as opaque for perceptive hashing.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.pdf-language-min-confidence
properties.description: Minimum language detector raw score for a language to count as present in a PDF.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.pdf-language-max-pages
properties.description: Maximum number of PDF pages extracted for language detection.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.pdf-language-max-chars
properties.description: Maximum number of extracted characters used for PDF language detection.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.pdf-title-max-lines
properties.description: Maximum number of first-page text lines inspected for PDF title extraction.

properties.name: resource-completion-config.pdf-title-font-size-tolerance
properties.description: Font-size tolerance used when grouping PDF title candidate lines.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs
properties.description: Product feed catalog and CSV mapping configuration by provider.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.catalog-url
properties.description: Provider catalog URL used to discover feed files.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.datasource-key-attribute
properties.description: Catalog column containing the datasource key or advertiser name.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.datasource-feed-name-attribute
properties.description: Catalog column containing the feed display name.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.datasource-url-attribute
properties.description: Catalog column containing the feed download URL.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.datasource-region-attribute
properties.description: Catalog column containing the feed region.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.datasource-language-attribute
properties.description: Catalog column containing the feed language.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.filter-attributes
properties.description: Catalog attribute filters that must match before a feed is indexed.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.exclude-feed-key-contains
properties.description: Case-insensitive fragments that exclude catalog feeds by key.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.feed-configs.*.default-csv-properties
properties.description: Default CSV mapping applied to generated datasource definitions.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.api-key
properties.description: API key used by the local fetcher node when calling the indexation API.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.concurrent-fetcher-task
properties.description: Maximum number of concurrent data fetcher tasks.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.log-accepted
properties.description: Log URLs accepted by crawler rules.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.api-synch-config.node-name
properties.description: Name of the local fetcher node for API synchronization.

properties.name: fetcher-properties.api-synch-config.node-url
properties.description: URL of the local fetcher node for API synchronization.
